summary: Applied two surgical seam edits: revised the opening construction for distinct chapter entry while preserving scene information, and added a final bridge beat that cleanly hands off into the hospital thread in chapter 16.
edits: Rewrote the first opening sentence to a different structural scaffold and inserted one sentence tying entry continuity to the chapter 14 tail (losing the black sedan before reaching Hyejin's church).
Added a single closing sentence at 04:37 with a call from Seoul St. Mary's emergency desk to strengthen exit continuity into chapter 16's hospital opening.
Verified style-bible calibration example_lines do not appear verbatim in chapter text.
